name: maskr.io-mcp-server
description: AI-powered image processing MCP server. Remove backgrounds and upscale images (2x/4x) directly from Claude or any MCP-compatible client. Uses GPU-accelerated processing with OAuth 2.1 authentication. Supports URL-based image input with instant results returned inline. Free credits on signup.
